name: pitch
description: Floating-card presenter deck with bottom navigation bar, speaker script panel, and slide-out TOC drawer. Cards are viewport-relative (not fixed 1280×720); each slide transitions with scale+translateY animation. Optimised for live presentations where the presenter needs access to speaking notes.

rendering.navigation: bottom footer bar — prev/next buttons + TOC drawer + script toggle

content_rules.notes: Floating card leaves natural padding on all sides. Titles up to 28 chars (2 display lines OK). Max 4 bullets; each bullet should be a concise takeaway. Divider slides must have a compelling image on the right panel. Script field is shown in the presenter panel — keep it to 2-3 sentences.

incompatible_styles.name: visual-heavy
incompatible_styles.reason: visual-heavy full-bleed background conflicts with pitch's floating rounded-card layout.

incompatible_styles.name: academic
incompatible_styles.reason: academic side illustration panel is too narrow in pitch's grid layout.

recommended_structure.pattern: Cover → Speaker Intro → Agenda → [Divider → 3-5 Content] × N → Contact
recommended_structure.notes: Divider slides mark chapter boundaries and require a visual image. Speaker intro slide uses 'profile' type. Contact slide uses 'contact' type.

author: co-deck
